description_long: This police car features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly red body accented by blue-tinted windows and black roof panels. The vehicle has a low, wide stance, with smooth, aerodynamic lines and a compact, armored appearance. The side panels display geometric patterns in red and blue, and the windows are heavily tinted, suggesting a high-tech or reinforced interior. The front and rear are both streamlined, with integrated lighting elements and subtle grille details. The car appears to lack traditional side mirrors, instead favoring a seamless, enclosed look. There are no visible police markings, insignia, or emergency lights, giving it a sleek, unmarked appearance.
description: A sleek, futuristic red police car with blue-tinted windows, geometric side patterns, and a compact, armored build. The vehicle is unmarked and features a streamlined, high-tech design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, low nose with blue-tinted windshield panels and subtle grille details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the geometric red and blue pattern, large blue-tinted side window, and angular body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a flat back with integrated lights and a license plate area, flanked by blue-tinted rear windows.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with matching geometric patterns and blue-tinted window, emphasizing the vehicle's symmetry.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on the rear of the vehicle, located centrally below the rear window. It appears rectangular and metallic, with dark text or markings, but no special police codes or department identifiers are visible.
